name: Fund for Reformed Companies (FONPER)
message: The Fondo Patrimonial de las Empresas Reformadas (FONPER) is an institution of the Dominican State created by virtue of Law number 124-01, enacted on July 24, 2001, whose fundamental mission is to watch over, safeguard and administer the State's shares in the companies that emerged from the reform and transformation process carried out as of 1997
